creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
pav@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: cannot run amarok after math/fftw3 upgrade
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: pav
> State-Changed-When: Tue Jun 9 16:48:26 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> fftw is at libfftw3.so.5, so it's clearly a problem that your amarok binary still uses old .so.4
> You need to resolve this problem first
>
>
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: ahze->pav
> Responsible-Changed-By: pav
> Responsible-Changed-When: Tue Jun 9 16:48:26 UTC 2009
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> Track
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=134764

"You need to resolve this problem first" is no help:

I wrote that I recompiled amarok after every upgrade oder downgrade of
fftw3. If the resukt is still asking for an old .so.4 -> 

HOW can I resolve this problem?
